.config [dir]
.config/demo [dir]
.config/demo/file1 -> <REPO>/demo/default/file1
.config/demo/file2 -> <REPO>/demo/default/file2
.config/easyrice [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs/easyrice.log [file]
.config/easyrice/repos [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/default [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/default/file1 [file]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/demo/default/file2 [file]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/rice.toml [file]
.config/easyrice/state.json [file]
